title: UIC student leaders honored with annual chancellor’s awards
summary_en: Almost 500 students were awarded for their impact across campus and across Chicago.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校举办第54届校长学生服务与领导力奖年度表彰活动

title: UIC Urban Forum will examine public service in America
summary_en: The April 22 event will explore the public sector’s future amid political, economic and social change.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校2026年城市论坛将研讨美国公共服务相关议题

title: UIC jazz saxophonist named Guggenheim fellow
summary_en: Jon Irabagon is among 223 artists, scientists, writers and scholars selected for the competitive honor.
title_cn: UIC jazz saxophonist named Guggenheim fellow

title: UIC Engineering launches AI curriculum initiatives
summary_en: Courses give students tools to harness the transformative power of generative AI in computing.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校工程学院推出人工智能课程建设举措

title: From her mother’s kitchen to Chicago’s food deserts
summary_en: Brianna Guerrier makes a case for nutrition as justice.
title_cn: 从母亲的厨房到芝加哥食物荒漠——伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校学生布里安娜·格里尔深耕营养服务领域
